headline: Capital One Redefines Its Role With Discover And Brex Platform Shift
summary: Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) has completed its acquisition of Discover Financial Services, creating the largest U.S. credit card issuer by balances. The company has also agreed to acquire corporate spend platform Brex in a US$5.15b deal, further extending its reach into business payments and financial technology. For you as an investor, these moves signal that NYSE:COF is no longer just a consumer credit card and retail banking business. With Discover now integrated and Brex on deck,...
